title: Industry Magic
description: Adventure a world where magic and tech owrk together to achieve the impossible. A magic mod package with Create tech support.
body:
![Header Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de544fc74c7b0f96f711984ad9dc93c932d88813.jpeg)

Prepare yourself to a new fantasy adventure where you can choose what kind of magic most suits your needs or style and use tech as support to your rituals.
Natural with Botania and Druidcraft or obscure with Blood Magic and Occultism.

![Dragons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee8b4b672200214051a8e36f6fcf35b00294b4af.jpeg)

Explore a world of fantastic creatures and choose your ride because... here be dragons for real! Choose your style, go by land or sky, conquer the Nether with your new skills or ride and prepare to explore the Better End with new lights and biomes to enhance your experience.

![Wild life](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4cd4ceff6cb361f003b7f9ec306dd6ed2375252.jpeg)

Enjoy also the simple wild life with a variety of animals and birds, hunt all the mysterious eggs and birds in every biome.

![House magic and tech](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/808346f9dda199510a127b4797bcb5b5ded5f685.jpeg)

Choose to do strange and new contraptions mixing the key features of tech and magic and prepare yourself to be called the ultimate technomage around!

This is a lightweight modpack, still with big mods and a lot of contents and possibilities.
Memory client side is 3/4Gb, can run on a server with 8Gb of RAM with ease for 10 players online (tested)

Mod List:

- Absent by design
- Alex's mobs
- BetterEnd Forge
- Blood Magic
- Botania
- Botany pots
- Carry on
- Chicken chunks
- Create
- Druidcraft
- Dungeon Crawl
- [Extra Golems](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-golems)
- Fast leaf decay
- Iron Chests
- JEI
- Mana Liquidizer
- [More Villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers)
- Mystical Agriculture
- Occultism
- Reliquary
- Sky Villages
- Storage Drawers
- Swing Through Grass
- Sword Display
- Wyrmroost
- [Xaeros Mini Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaeros World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)
- YUNG's Better Mineshafts

Optionally (for the same ambient seen in the screenshots) you can download extra mods that are not permitted to redistribute, but completely legal to have for your personal use:

- Better village
- Extended Lights
- True Weaponary
- Exotic Birds
- Mystical Pumpkins
- Library Ferret

In this modpack there are mods that are no longer updated and I can't make a new version that is faithful to the original, but I am working on a modern version with all the mods still present and some more connection to make a modern version of the pack. Hope soon to finisch tests client side.

_This is a modpack well tested on a server for long time with friends, provided hours of fun and I wanted to share the project with other._
